reason: Replace contradictory South Sudan browser, server and widget formulas with one reviewed statutory-reference contract. The shared engine applies the five monthly PIT bands in the Financial Act FY 2023/24, deducts the 8% employee NSIF or approved funded-pension contribution before PIT, adds the 30% surtax on computed PIT from the Taxation Amendment Act 2012, and shows 17% employer NSIF separately. The UI does not label the last primary schedule located as newly enacted 2026 rates and removes the unsupported secondary-employment shortcut.

fixtureDeltas.reason: The repeated monthly case now applies the complete five-band schedule and statutory 30% PIT surtax after the approved 8% employee contribution deduction.
The high-income fixture preserves decimal input, reaches the statutory 20% top marginal band and includes the PIT surtax that the legacy server omitted.
The zero-income baseline remains zero under the reviewed PIT, surtax and NSIF contract.
